response.step_by_step_log: Visual OCR identified the song title "がおってこ！" and composer "かめりあ" on-screen at 01:07. I simplified the artist name for the search to "Camellia" and "Shishiro Botan". I used the search string '"がおってこ！" 獅白ぼたん lyrics Japanese and English' to retrieve the official lyrics. I identified the song as a single performance segment and dialogue intervals.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory dialogue by Shishiro Botan and friends, followed by a performance of her original song "Gaotteko!", and concluding with more dialogue.

scenes.description: Introductory dialogue by Shishiro Botan and Amane Kanata.
Shishiro Botan performs the song "Gaotteko!" on stage with dance choreography. Song title and credits appear on-screen.
